subcodes.first_line: O handmaiden of God! The True One, glorified be His majesty, hath appeared that all who dwell on earth may attain unto His recognition and presence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امه الله حق جل جلاله از برای آن ظاهر تا جمیع من علی الارض بعرفان و لقائش
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @high station of the true believer, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people
